title: Absolute Zero
wikitext:
[[File:4.00.jpg|centre|thumb|650x650px|''[[Aquarius Camus]], alongside other Aquarius Saints in [[Saint Seiya]], are capable of manipulating ice and cold through their Cosmos, and reaching a temperature of - 273.15 Celsius through the Aurora Execution technique'']]

==Summary==
'''Absolute Zero''' is the point of cold at which enthalpy and entropy hit their minimum level. It is the ultimate form of freezing and in the theoretical situation that someone is exposed to it, their body will be frozen at the atomic level before collapsing under their own mass since the loss of energy causes the atoms to lose their cohesiveness. Due to the nature of the ability working on the atomic level, it can be considered a form of [[Durability Negation]], ignoring conventional defenses unless a character is shown to be able to resist such attacks. Please read our [[Absolute Zero Feats in Fiction]] page to determine if showings are actually viable enough to be placed on a profile.

==Users==
*[[Rukia Kuchiki]] ([[Bleach]])
*[[Dianamon]], [[MetalGarurumon]], and [[Omegamon]] ([[Digimon]])
*[[Mega Man (Classic)|Mega Man]] and [[X (Mega Man)|Mega Man X]] ([[Mega Man (Franchise)|Mega Man]])
*[[Aquarius Camus|Aquarius]] Cloth Users and [[Cygnus Hyoga]] ([[Saint Seiya]])
*[[Iron Man (Marvel Comics)|Iron Man ]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Bayonetta (Bayonetta 3)|Bayonetta]] ([[Bayonetta (Verse)|Bayonetta]])
